name: EdwCchgLoadRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH cte_min AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS MIN_RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'CCHG' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE p SET p.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC p JOIN cte_min ON p.SRC_SYS_CD = cte_min.SRC_SYS_CD AND p.SUBJ_CD = cte_min.SUBJ_CD AND p.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte_min.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE p.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte_min.MIN_RUN_CYC_NO AND p.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
DESCRIPTION:    Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.


PROCESSING:  Each IDS Claim source has a seperate SQL to extract the maximum run cycle value.  These run cycle values are used to update the IDS P_RUN_CYCLE, load indicator field for the particular source and subject.  All run cycles less than the maximum where the indicator is "N" are updated to "Y".
  




MODIFICATIONS:

------------------      ----------------------------     --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------    -----------------------------------   -------------------------          ----------------------------

Annotations:
Get list of source systems and the maximum run cycles for the source system from the IDS table.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
